AI & ML Jobs — AI-first roles, classified daily

faq.q: How often is this list updated?
faq.a: Every day. A GitHub Action pulls the freshest entry-level software engineering jobs from Dreamwork's public API, which crawls 400,000+ live listings directly from company career pages (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, and more). Use <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>F</kbd> to search for backend, frontend, full-stack, mobile, embedded, DevOps, or cybersecurity roles.

faq.q: What counts as a "new grad" job here?
faq.a: Roles classified as junior/entry-level in engineering, data science, or security — no senior, staff, or management titles, and no internships (those live in our [Tech Internships list](https://github.com/ponder-surveys/Tech-Internships-2026)). Most are a great fit for 2025–2027 graduates in CS and related fields.

faq.q: Where does the salary data come from?
faq.a: Salaries are parsed from the job descriptions themselves (many US postings disclose ranges due to pay-transparency laws). If a posting doesn't disclose pay, the column is blank.

faq.q: Can a tool just apply to these for me?
faq.a: That's literally what Dreamwork does — it matches your résumé against every listing here, tailors your application, and can apply autonomously while you sleep. The free tier shows all your matches.
